ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "structure" TEXT /* 3D structure of the protein (PDB format) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the protein data (e.g., UniProt, PDB) */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomic ID of the organism the protein is from */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein's function or role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein entry was last updated */,
  "protein_version" TEXT /* Version of the protein data */,
  "protein_aliases" TEXT /* Alternative names or identifiers for the protein */,
  "publication_id" TEXT /* ID of the publication related to the protein */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for better search and filtering */,
  "is_obsolete" INTEGER /* Mark if the protein is obsolete */,
  "last_curated_by" TEXT /* User who last curated the protein data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "protein_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first protein in the interaction */,
  "protein_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second protein in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., physical, functional) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the interaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction data (e.g., STRING, IntAct) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction entry was last updated */,
  "interaction_version" TEXT /* Version of the interaction data */,
  "interaction_aliases" TEXT /* Alternative names for the interaction */,
  "publication_id" TEXT /* ID of the publication related to the interaction */,
  "interaction_site" TEXT /* Interaction site on the proteins */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  "is_obsolete" INTEGER /* Mark if the interaction is obsolete */,
  "last_curated_by" TEXT /* User who last curated the interaction data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_protein_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id_1") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_protein_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id_2") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_similarities" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity score */,
  "protein_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first protein in the similarity pair */,
  "protein_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second protein in the similarity pair */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the proteins */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the similarity (e.g., BLAST, Needleman-Wunsch) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the similarity entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the similarity entry was last updated */,
  "similarity_version" TEXT /* Version of the similarity data */,
  "publication_id" TEXT /* ID of the publication related to the similarity */,
  "alignment_details" TEXT /* Details of the alignment method used */,
  "is_obsolete" INTEGER /* Mark if the similarity is obsolete */,
  "last_curated_by" TEXT /* User who last curated the similarity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_similarities_protein_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id_1") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_similarities_protein_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id_2") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, bioinformatician, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Mark if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the account */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Mark if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
